knowledge_atoms.text:
April 15th
My cat has two new kittens. They are pink because they are very young. They still can't see.

April 21st
The kittens are six days old. They make noises when they are hungry. They have white fur now. They are cute.

April 26th
Their eyes are open! They are blue.
Cool! What will you do for your mum?
I'll go swimming tonight. Will you go?
It's Labour Day. When is the reading festival?
It's on the second Sunday in May.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 在五月的第二个星期日。

knowledge_atoms.text: Learn the unvoiced 'th' sound /θ/ as in 'three'.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习清辅音'th' /θ/ 的发音，如'three'。

knowledge_atoms.text: Learn the voiced 'th' sound /ð/ as in 'this'.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习浊辅音'th' /ð/ 的发音，如'this'。

knowledge_atoms.text: Learn to write ordinal number abbreviations (st, nd, rd, th).
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习书写序数词的缩写（st, nd, rd, th）。

knowledge_atoms.text: Listen again and tick or cross.

May 3rd
The kittens can walk now. They can play with Robin!
My cousin's birthday is on Mid-Autumn Festival this year!
Now write two sentences about the kittens.
The school art show and the reading festival.
The singing test will be on May 4th.
There are some other special days in May.
Using 'will' to make invitations and talk about future plans.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 使用'will'发出邀请和谈论未来计划。

knowledge_atoms.text: We eat mooncakes. My family will also eat a birthday cake.
What do you usually do on Mid-Autumn Festival?
What will you do for your mum?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 你将为你的妈妈做什么？

knowledge_atoms.text: When is Mid-Autumn Festival this year?
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 今年的中秋节是什么时候？

knowledge_atoms.text: When is the baby's birthday? Listen and tick.
Which month are they talking about? Listen and tick.
Will you play football with me after lunch?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: When is the art show?. 单元首页图。页面展示了两个场景：上面是两个学生在讨论母亲节的日期；下面是小熊和小松鼠们在为他们的妈妈庆祝生日。两个场景都围绕节日和日期的主题展开。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Mother's Day?
Can you say: When is Mother's Day?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Festivals and Dates. 莎拉和吴彬彬在练习书法时，讨论了今年的中秋节。他们谈论了中秋节的日期、传统活动（吃月饼），吴彬彬还提到今年他的堂兄生日恰好也在中秋节。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Mid-Autumn Festival?
Can you say: When is Mid-Autumn Festival this year?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Holidays and Dates. 琼斯老师和张鹏在讨论五月份的特殊日子，包括学校艺术展和读书节，并确定了它们的具体日期。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word special days?
Can you say: When is the art show?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Dates and Events. 通过一个展示四月份活动安排的日历板，学习序数词（1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th）以及与学校活动相关的词汇。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word April 1st?
Can you say: When is the sports meet?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Phonics: th. 听录音，圈出每组中'th'发音与例词相同的单词。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen, circle and say.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Birthdays and Dates. 陈洁和迈克在讨论生日。他们发现迈克的生日和陈洁妈妈的生日是同一天。陈洁计划为妈妈煮面条，并邀请迈克一起来庆祝。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word birthday?
Can you say: When is your birthday?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Dates and Ordinal Numbers. 通过展示家庭成员的生日卡片，学习表达具体日期的方法，重点练习大于10的序数词。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word October 12th?
Can you say: When is Grandpa's birthday?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Growth of Kittens. 莎拉的日记，记录了她家两只新生小猫在不同日期的成长变化，从刚出生看不见到眼睛睁开，再到长出白毛和学会走路。
entry_probe_questions:
Can you say: April 15th
My cat has two new kittens. They are pink because they are very young. They still can't see.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit 4 Check & Wrap-up. 听录音，根据听到的生日日期，为四张日期卡片排序。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and number.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. 一个关于“熟能生巧”的连环画故事。小熊祖姆为了准备5月4日的歌唱比赛，放弃了参加兔子生日派对、踢足球和看电视的机会，专心练习唱歌。最终，他在比赛中表现出色，得到了老师的表扬，并愉快地接受了朋友晚上游泳的邀请。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word singing test?
Can you say: Practice makes perfect.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 单元首页图。页面展示了两个场景：上面是两个学生在讨论母亲节的日期；下面是小熊和小松鼠们在为他们的妈妈庆祝生日。两个场景都围绕节日和日期的主题展开。 Key patterns: When is Mother's Day?; It's on the second Sunday in May.
core_patterns: It's on the second Sunday in May.
allowed_answer_scope: It's on the second Sunday in May.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Mother's Day?
Can you say: When is Mother's Day?
return_anchors: It's on the second Sunday in May.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 莎拉和吴彬彬在练习书法时，讨论了今年的中秋节。他们谈论了中秋节的日期、传统活动（吃月饼），吴彬彬还提到今年他的堂兄生日恰好也在中秋节。 Key patterns: When is Mid-Autumn Festival this year?; What do you usually do on Mid-Autumn Festival?
core_patterns: When is Mid-Autumn Festival this year?
What do you usually do on Mid-Autumn Festival?
We eat mooncakes. My family will also eat a birthday cake.
My cousin's birthday is on Mid-Autumn Festival this year!
allowed_answer_scope: We eat mooncakes. My family will also eat a birthday cake.
My cousin's birthday is on Mid-Autumn Festival this year!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Mid-Autumn Festival?
Can you say: When is Mid-Autumn Festival this year?
return_anchors: When is Mid-Autumn Festival this year?
What do you usually do on Mid-Autumn Festival?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听一段对话，根据内容判断对话中正在讨论的月份，并勾选正确的选项。 Key patterns: Which month are they talking about? Listen and tick.
core_patterns: Which month are they talking about? Listen and tick.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Which month are they talking about? Listen and tick.
return_anchors: Which month are they talking about? Listen and tick.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 琼斯老师和张鹏在讨论五月份的特殊日子，包括学校艺术展和读书节，并确定了它们的具体日期。 Key patterns: When is the art show?; It's on May 1st.
core_patterns: It's Labour Day. When is the reading festival?
There are some other special days in May.
The school art show and the reading festival.
allowed_answer_scope: There are some other special days in May.
The school art show and the reading festival.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word special days?
Can you say: When is the art show?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice match activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个配对和口语练习。学生需要将节日名称与其对应的日期进行匹配，并练习询问和回答节日的日期。 Key patterns: When is China's National Day?; It's on October 1st.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: When is China's National Day?
branchable_topics: Talk about the holidays with your partner.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 通过一个展示四月份活动安排的日历板，学习序数词（1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th, 5th）以及与学校活动相关的词汇。 Key patterns: When is the sports meet?; It's on April 5th.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word April 1st?
Can you say: When is the sports meet?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 提供多个写有不同日期和活动的便签，引导学生练习询问和回答关于具体活动日期的问题。 Key patterns: When is the English test?; It's on November 2nd.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word singing contest?
Can you say: When is the English test?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Notice and repeat the target pronunciation pattern.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 学习字母组合'th'的两种发音：浊辅音 /ð/ 和清辅音 /θ/。 Key patterns: Learn the voiced 'th' sound /ð/ as in 'this'.; Learn the unvoiced 'th' sound /θ/ as in 'three'.
core_patterns: Learn the voiced 'th' sound /ð/ as in 'this'.
Learn the unvoiced 'th' sound /θ/ as in 'three'.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word three?
Can you say: Learn the voiced 'th' sound /ð/ as in 'this'.
return_anchors: Learn the voiced 'th' sound /ð/ as in 'this'.
Learn the unvoiced 'th' sound /θ/ as in 'three'.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，圈出每组中'th'发音与例词相同的单词。 Key patterns: Listen, circle and say.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen, circle and say.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 从每句的斜杠选项中选择正确的单词，组成通顺的句子并写下来。 Key patterns: Choose, write and say.
allowed_answer_scope: His mother is a maths teacher.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Choose, write and say.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听一段对话，根据内容判断宝宝的生日是哪一天，并勾选正确的日期。 Key patterns: When is the baby's birthday? Listen and tick.
core_patterns: When is the baby's birthday? Listen and tick.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: When is the baby's birthday? Listen and tick.
return_anchors: When is the baby's birthday? Listen and tick.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 陈洁和迈克在讨论生日。他们发现迈克的生日和陈洁妈妈的生日是同一天。陈洁计划为妈妈煮面条，并邀请迈克一起来庆祝。 Key patterns: When is your birthday?; My birthday is on April 4th.
core_patterns: What will you do for your mum?
Cool! What will you do for your mum?
allowed_answer_scope: Please come then. We can have a birthday party for both of you!

Can you say: When is your birthday?
return_anchors: What will you do for your mum?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个角色扮演活动。学生根据提示卡上的生日信息，练习询问和回答关于生日日期的问题。 Key patterns: When is your birthday?; My birthday is on January 1st.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: When is your birthday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 通过展示家庭成员的生日卡片，学习表达具体日期的方法，重点练习大于10的序数词。 Key patterns: When is Grandpa's birthday?; It's on October 12th.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word October 12th?
Can you say: When is Grandpa's birthday?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 观察一个日历，并学习如何在日期数字旁正确书写序数词的缩写形式（如 5th, 6th）。下方的对话提供了一个问答生日的示例。 Key patterns: Learn to write ordinal number abbreviations (st, nd, rd, th).; When is your birthday?
core_patterns: Learn to write ordinal number abbreviations (st, nd, rd, th).
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Learn to write ordinal number abbreviations (st, nd, rd, th).
return_anchors: Learn to write ordinal number abbreviations (st, nd, rd, th).

My cat has two new kittens. They are pink because they are very young. They still can't see.; April 21st
The kittens are six days old. They make noises when they are hungry. They have white fur now. They are cute.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice match activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据日记内容，将描述小猫成长里程碑的句子与对应的日期进行匹配。 Key patterns: Read and match.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据日记和配对练习，写出关于小猫的另外两个句子。 Key patterns: Now write two sentences about the kittens.
core_patterns: Now write two sentences about the kittens.

They have white fur on April 21st.

return_anchors: Now write two sentences about the kittens.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，根据听到的生日日期，为四张日期卡片排序。 Key patterns: Listen and number.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and number.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 再次听录音，根据听到的内容判断关于生日的四个陈述句是否正确。 Key patterns: Listen again and tick or cross.
core_patterns: Listen again and tick or cross.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 总结和巩固基数词与序数词的对应关系。学生需要填写表格，写出部分基数词对应的序数词。 Key patterns: Fill in the table.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Fill in the table.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据括号内的基数词提示，使用正确的基数词或序数词形式完成句子。 Key patterns: Finish the sentences.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Finish the sentences.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个关于“熟能生巧”的连环画故事。小熊祖姆为了准备5月4日的歌唱比赛，放弃了参加兔子生日派对、踢足球和看电视的机会，专心练习唱歌。最终，他在比赛中表现出色，得到了老师的表扬，并愉快地接受了朋友晚上游泳的邀请。 Key patterns: Practice makes perfect.; Using 'will' to make invitations and talk about future plans.
core_patterns: Using 'will' to make invitations and talk about future plans.
Will you play football with me after lunch?
I'll go swimming tonight. Will you go?
The singing test will be on May 4th.
allowed_answer_scope: The singing test will be on May 4th.
Sorry, I can't. I want to practise my song.
Sorry, I can't. I want to practise the song.
Let's watch TV together. The show is very funny!
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word singing test?
Can you say: Practice makes perfect.
return_anchors: Using 'will' to make invitations and talk about future plans.
Will you play football with me after lunch?
